title: Cipher Mining September 2024 Operational Update - 9.3 EH/s Hashrate
text: Bitcoin Production: Cipher mined approximately 155 BTC in September 2024, with additional 4 BTC equivalent from power sales. Company sold roughly 923 BTC during month and held approximately 1,512 BTC at month-end. Hashrate: Company operated at 9.3 EH/s (exahashes per second) of mining hashrate by end of September. Deployed Infrastructure: Cipher had 78,000 mining rigs deployed and operational during period. Key Development: Management noted that With anticipated completion of Odessa upgrade by year-end, we will have one of most efficient fleets of mining rigs in industry. Company completed acquisition of 300 MW Barber Lake site and continued Black Pearl data center construction, targeting energization by end of Q2 2025.
